executives.name: Anil Chakravarthy
executives.background: Mr. Chakravarthy has served as President, Digital Experience Business since January 2020. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Chief Executive Officer of Informatica LLC from 2016 to 2020.

executives.name: Marianne Brown
executives.background: Marianne C. Brown was Co-Chief Operating Officer, Global Financial Solutions, of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS).

tenure_dates.title: Co-Chief Operating Officer, Global Financial Solutions
